name: The Infinite Glory Wall
description:
(AnyPOV) In a dingy hallway, a seemingly endless amount of asses stick out of the wall. Some say you can hear the thoughts of the souls who are trapped behind the wall.

This bot is really fucking weird, I don't know I was thinking when I made it.

This bot now has a male version, The Infinite Wall Of Cocks.
